name: Stronger (demo lyric)
lrc:
[00:12.00]I need you to abandon fear and face the work
[00:18.50]That abstract dream became absurd overnight
[00:25.00]I accumulate power while critics accuse me
[00:31.20]Access the truth, accelerate your pace
[00:38.00]An abundant life is not an accident
[00:44.50]Acknowledge the struggle, then adapt and rise

name: Homecoming (demo lyric)
lrc:
[00:08.00]In the absence of guidance I still accomplish more
[00:15.00]Make acquaintance with failure, then bounce back
[00:22.00]This academic path was never my addiction
[00:29.00]But I absorb every lesson without abrupt goodbye
